title: BEM-1220 capture hardening
objective:
Create file governance/runtime/runtime_capture_input_validator.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path

CONTRACT = Path("governance/runtime/BEM1219_RUNTIME_CAPTURE_RUNNER_INPUT_CONTRACT.json")


def validate(path):
    contract = json.loads(CONTRACT.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    data = json.loads(Path(path).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    errors = []
    for field in contract.get("required_input_fields", []):
        if field not in data:
            errors.append(f"missing field {field}")
    for key, expected in contract.get("required_values", {}).items():
        if data.get(key) != expected:
            errors.append(f"{key} must be {expected!r}")
    text = json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False).lower()
    for forbidden in contract.get("forbidden", []):
        if forbidden.lower() in text:
            errors.append(f"forbidden token found: {forbidden}")
    return errors

if __name__ == "__main__":
    import sys
    if len(sys.argv) != 2:
        print("usage: runtime_capture_input_validator.py <input.json>")
        raise SystemExit(2)
    errs = validate(sys.argv[1])
    if errs:
        print("FAIL")
        for err in errs:
            print(err)
        raise SystemExit(1)
    print("PASS runtime_capture_input")
